title: 2024 AFN Convention Theme & Keynote Announcement
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – The Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) Board of Directors is proud to announce that the theme for the 2024 Convention will be “Our Children – Our Future Ancestors.” The convention will take place in Anchorage, Alaska from October 17th – 19th, 2024. title: Stay safe on the water
summary: The river ice has broken up and summer is just around the corner! This is a good time to review some measures you can take to ensure you are ready for and continue to stay safe during this boating season! Boating is a way of life in the Yukon-Kuskokwim Delta, whether you are traveling, fishing, logging or just going for a boat ride, tubing, canoeing, rafting, kayaking, swimming and other activities in the water. Be prepared every time you go out. Life jackets save lives! Buckle up! Make sure you and your loved ones wear a properly-fitting life...

title: Alaska SBDC Closed for Memorial Day
summary: In observance of Memorial Day, the Alaska Small Business Development Center will be closed on Monday, May 27th, 2024, in alignment with the University of Alaska Anchorage. We will resume normal business hours on Tuesday, May 28th. We wish you a safe and meaningful Memorial Day! The post Alaska SBDC...

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 20 May, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 20 May, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
